briefdescription.para: Failed to create the genesis block.
Genesis block has invalid signature.
Genesis block created by unauthorized key.
Failed to serialize/deserialize genesis block.
Genesis block wasn't received.
Account creation is missing.
Failed to create account creation block.
Account creation block has invalid signature.
Failed to serialize/deserialize account creation block.
Account creation block not properly linked to genesis.
Failed to create validator registry.
Blockchain not fully initialized yet.
Error class of the Blockchain module.
Topic used for the blockchain CRDT.
Default CID / hex of the Genesis block creator pub address (authorized).
CRDT database instance.
GeniusAccount instance.
Callback when the processing of the blockchain is done.
Cached genesis block for easy access.
Cached account creation block.
Logger instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > global_db, std::shared_ptr< GeniusAccount > account, BlockchainCallback callback)
memberdef.name: New

briefdescription.para: Factory method to create Blockchain as shared_ptr.
Set the authorized full node public address (for testing purposes).

parameterdescription.para: The public address that is authorized to create genesis blocks

briefdescription.para: Get the current authorized full node public address.

simplesect.para: The authorized full node public address

briefdescription.para: Start the blockchain with async genesis block handling.
Handle received genesis block from pubsub.
Handle received account creation block from pubsub.

parameterdescription.para: The received account creation block data

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > global_db, std::shared_ptr< GeniusAccount > account, BlockchainCallback callback)
memberdef.name: Blockchain

briefdescription.para: Make constructor private to force use of factory method.
